name: Balrampur Chini Mills Limited
summary: Balrampur Chini Mills Limited, an integrated sugar manufacturing company, manufactures and sells sugar from sugarcane in India. The company operates through three segments: Sugar, Co-generation, and Distillery. It also offers molasses, pressmud, industrial alcohol, ethanol, and bagasse; and manufactures and sells agricultural fertilizers, such as soil conditioner, granulated potash, etc. In addition, the company is involved in the generation and sale of electricity. Balrampur Chini Mills Limited was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Kolkata, India.
